ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var orders = payload.compositeResponse.body[0].records[0] var lineItems = payload.compositeResponse.body[1].records[0] --- { "Proposta_EmpresaCod": orders.Store__r.DealerNetExternalId__c, "Proposta_VeiculoCod": orders.Asset.ExternalId__c, "Proposta_BancoPedidoCod": orders.campo, "Proposta_Pedido": orders.OrderNumber, "Proposta_Versao": orders.Asset.Version__c, "Proposta_Valor": orders.TotalAmount, "Proposta_DataValidade": orders.EffectiveDate, "Proposta_EnviaEmail": orders.MainContact__r.ContactPreference__c, "Proposta_SMS": orders.MainContact__r.ContactPreference__c, "Proposta_EntregaPesquisaEmail": orders.MainContact__r.ContactPreference__c, "Proposta_Observacao": orders.Description, "Proposta_PercDescontoMax": lineItems.Discount__c, "Atendimento_Codigo": orders.DealerNetServiceCode__c, "Proposta_FamiliaVeiculoCod": orders.Asset.Product2.VehicleFamilyCode__c, "Proposta_EstoqueCod": orders.Asset.StockCode__c, "Proposta_VeiculoModeloCod": orders.Asset.ModelCode__c, "Proposta_DataCriacao": orders.CreatedDate, "Proposta_DataConfirmacao": orders.CreatedDate, "Proposta_PrecoPublico": lineItems.ListPrice, "Proposta_DataValidadePedido": orders.EffectiveDate, "Proposta_VeiculoValor": lineItems.UnitPrice, "Proposta_FinanceiraDes": orders.CreditAnalysis__r.FinancingBank__c, "Proposta_ModeloVeiculoDes": orders.Asset.Product2.Name, "Proposta_StatusFinancei": orders.ExternalIdDealerNet__c, }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var installments = payload.compositeResponse.body[2].records[0] --- { "codigoProposta": installments.Order__r.ExternalId__c, "dataVencimento": installments.DueDate__c, "valor": installments.ApprovedInstallmentAmount__c, "observacao": installments.Description__c, "valorJuros": installments.InterestAmount__c, "numeroDocumento": installments.Order.Account.CPFCNPJ__c, "codigoUsarioCriacao": installments.Owner.DealerNetCode__c, "dataCriacao": installments.CreatedDate, "codigoUsuarioAlteracao": installments.LastModifiedBy.DealerNetCode__c, "dataAlteracao": installments.LastModifiedDate, "codigoTipoParcela": installments.PaymentCondition__r.ExternalId__c, "codigoAvaliacaoUsado": installments.UsedVehicleEvaluation__r.ExternalId__c, "placaVeiculoUsado": installments.UsedVehicleEvaluation__r.VehiclePlate__c, "grupoConsorcio": installments.ConsortiumGroup__c, "cotaConsorcio": installments.ConsortiumQuote__c, "parcelas": installments.NumberInstallmentsApproved__c, "codigoBancoCheque": installments.FinancingBank__c, "agenciaCheque": installments.CheckAgency__c, "contaCorrenteCheque": installments.CheckingAccount__c, "codigoCondicaoPagamento": installments.PaymentCondition__r.ExternalId__c, "codigoTipoDocumentoTEF": installments.PaymentCondition__r.Name, "valorParcelasFinanciamento": installments.ApprovedInstallmentAmount__c, }

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var asset = payload.compositeResponse.body[0].records[0] --- { "VeiculoReserva_Codigo": asset.BookingCode__c, "VeiculoReserva_BancoPedidoCod": asset.Opportunity__r.RecordType.Name, "VeiculoReserva_ValorEntrada": asset.Price, "VeiculoReserva_DataInicial": asset.ReservationDateTime__c, "VeiculoReserva_DataFinal": asset.ReservationExpirationDateTime__c, "VeiculoReserva_Status": asset.Status, "VeiculoReserva_VeiculoCod": asset.ExternalId__c, "Atendimento_Codig": asset.Opportunity.DealerNetServiceCode__c, }
